briefs.title: BC Railway Safety Rules Updated — Locomotive, Track, and Extreme Heat Standards Refreshed
briefs.summary: Effective January 15, 2026, BC is adopting updated federal railway safety rules covering train operations, locomotive inspections, track safety, and a new rule on managing extreme heat and wildfire risk.
briefs.action_required: Review the four updated/new railway rules and confirm your operations comply before January 15, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC updated Railway Safety Adopted Provisions Regulation takes effect
